name: Jay Inslee
subject: This should show 'em
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Being green is a team effort -- we need you now.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTI0OTY1MzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTMwMDQwMTM0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, Over the past year, I've worked hard to show leadership on climate in the vacuum left by President Trump. But combatting climate change isn't a project I can tackle alone. Fortunately, I have all of you -- a community full of people who believe that climate change requires action _now_. A population pushing forward for a clean energy future, for pollution caps and emission standards. Together, we've seen the West Coast's clean economy sector growing twice as fast as the rest of the economy. But now, I need your help as we gear up to make more progress on climate action in Washington this legislative session. **At 11: 59:59 PM on Friday, December 8, we hit a state-mandated fundraising freeze. That's why I'm announcing this goal: If we hit 1,000 grassroots donors before that deadline, we'll show the country and our own state legislature how much this matters to us.** [**So I 'm asking you -- chip in $5, or whatever you can. Become one of our 1,000 strong.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTI0OTY1MzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTMwMDQwMTM0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Political change in America comes not from the top but from the roots. Here in Washington, our collective voice on combating climate change can chart the path for the country. It's time to show that power. I strongly believe that Democrats must offer their vision to empower communities across America and reconnect with voters who've been left behind by politics as usual. We must focus on matters that are urgent and local in the lives of ordinary Americans -- and, make no mistake, that means combating climate change to prevent the floods and fires that are destroying their homes. The power of change lies at the state level. States like Washington (and Oregon and California -- the other members of the Great Blue Wall) are the place where Donald Trump cannot stop us. He cannot stop our clean energy jobs programs. He cannot stop us from collaborating to reduce greenhouse gas emissions. He cannot stop us from leading. **The proof of that lies with you**. Our grassroots team has shown again and again this year that Donald Trump cannot stop us. So let's send a strong message right now about the progress we will make this legislative session -- together we will rally behind transitioning to clean energy and charting a course for the jobs of tomorrow. Together we have the power to get this done. [**Chip in now -- let 's get to 1,000 grassroots donations before Friday and show Trump who's really in charge.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTI0OTY1MzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTMwMDQwMTM0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Together we will get this done. We will build a progressive movement behind a clean energy economy that works for everyone -- a movement that will propel our vision forward every day, no matter who's leading the other Washington. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTI0OTY1MzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTMwMDQwMTM0MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: The White House
subject: Another day, another record
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a5626ce2c42736343fbaa331b7e8d9ea689c0a686a2715b7de9710a0d7fbef5af013655beddce52e1a04fc70d3c90bdf8e4528db3c4b126e

Another day, another record

President Donald J. Trump has frequently mentioned that he hopes Republican tax cuts will deliver an early Christmas gift for all Americans this December.

On at least one count, it looks like Christmas may have come even sooner than expected.

The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed yesterday at a new record high of 24,290—the 64th record-setting close for the stock market under President Trump. This latest surge came as the market climbed more than 200 points to open trading yesterday morning, buoyed by news from over the weekend that Republican senators had voted to pass sweeping tax-reform legislation.

It’s clear that American businesses are hungry for a 21st-century tax code built for growth.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a5626ce2c42736340b5d2a69fab1a81032e9c9c1c8fb3aab46b297ad09cfd819a7ada36f900644d3cee152013678581fade32d4846653a68
Learn more.

Bonus: Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell explains
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a5626ce2c42736346ddb55bf8c62a06f2244f363226f6d5d15ec26402c96e14c57b36c099b41e1d01f91f4a5278fb9f7cec17fc76ccc4a03
“Tax reform: What’s in it for you.”

Fact vs. fiction on federal monuments

President Trump visited Salt Lake City, Utah, yesterday to announce two major proclamations modifying the boundaries of the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a5626ce2c4273634e36f154b5390df53cbebb604ef544a3d82a6ff8019e8d6679750f6659eab2f4c13d0684f722d719064881ac45c0cf1ae
Bears Ears and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a5626ce2c427363478b3d6b765bb0ab37cbe6b9d0749db7d346df732c4fde72605888d4fc7e79279a0598ba4627aed667b6b8142b65051c0
Grand Staircase-Escalante national monuments .

As usual, there’s plenty of misinformation making the rounds. Here are a few quick facts to correct the record:

- Myth: No president has ever shrunk a monument. Fact: Monuments have been shrunk at least 18 times—by presidents on both sides of the aisle.
- Myth: This move will sell or close national parks. Fact: No national parks are under review, and the Administration adamantly opposes wholesale transfer of any public lands.
- Myth: The review was done behind closed doors. Fact: Secretary of the Interior Ryan Zinke personally held more than 60 meetings with local stakeholders, including numerous tribal groups.
The media is exactly right on one point, though: This is a significant decision by the President worth
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a5626ce2c427363432eea8bef19a796ecdb3d16aa010f79c4729293e062c4b111b4ce7597df0f5c0035bb856e34b9775411e0691ea92cb7b
reading about in full.

An important day you may have missed

Amid the recent headlines on tax reform, a solemn occasion may have slipped by unnoticed by many last Friday. President Trump proclaimed December 1, 2017, as World AIDS Day,
a moment to “honor those who have lost their lives to AIDS [and] celebrate the remarkable progress we have made in combatting this disease.”

Ambassador-at-Large Deborah Birx, M.D., highlighted how U.S. leadership has been the difference maker. When the President’s Emergency Plan for AIDS Relief (PEPFAR) “began in 2003, only 50,000 people were receiving lifesaving antiretroviral treatment (ART) in sub-Saharan Africa. Today, PEPFAR supports more than 13.3 million men, women, and children on ART.”

Read Amb. Birx’s full post:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a5626ce2c4273634425719070d50548492c64e82a03c89bb253c9a4541a8293bac6443416d4a92c1856ca9c0f0c7f7f4f34c1186c7138815
With American Leadership, We Are on the Brink of Controlling AIDS.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks at the Utah State Capitol | December 4, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

This afternoon, President Trump will have lunch with Republican members of the Senate.
Later the President will lead a discussion with American business owners and their families in the Oval Office.

COMING UP

Tomorrow, the President will hold a meeting of his Cabinet at the White House.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a5626ce2c427363486405dc2c37615b1ac0b5869595ea2930be3eee81d7ed20f15c4d862208ea860d96514637fc6a3e0e731e68cc294c8a4
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=a5626ce2c427363492c1c4d645c47ab7b4bc73a303e3f98a2ecd38afe9124c28839f79158b47bed94841c6d1abca8786dc7bba905eef90c6
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d433f728799393e630756087c39bc5e35293dff8bc0721baab04e2310d34f7da1fb120dc837635ce4a2ed1c7944a72c911
Unsubscribe

name: LegitAction Team
subject: Russ Feingold: Our ethics matter [video]
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Donald Trump’s flouting of ethics isn’t just a matter of law. It’s a
matter of democratic legitimacy and national security.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/2144?t=1002&akid=442%2E356062%2EDqwTxh ]Check out this short video of LegitAction founder Russ Feingold on
MSNBC denouncing Donald Trump’s obvious corruption, then share it with
your family and friends:

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/2144?t=1003&akid=442%2E356062%2EDqwTxh ]Watch the video

The National Republican Congressional Committee is offering donors an
all-expenses-paid trip to the Trump International Hotel in Washington,
D.C. -- violating the ethics of legitimate government, and most likely
the Emoluments Clause in the Constitution itself.

The American people must demand accountability in the face of such
obvious corruption.

The mere presence of the Trump International Hotel in the middle of
our nation’s capital is sending a delegitimizing message to special
interests: why work through our systems or our laws when you can buy
access to the president instead?

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/2144?t=1004&akid=442%2E356062%2EDqwTxh ]We must defend our legitimacy against corruption under the Trump
administration. Watch the video today, then share it with your family
and friends.

Wealthy interests already have too much power in our political system.
Together, we can and must demand greater accountability from our
government.

Thank you for supporting democratic legitimacy today,

LegitAction Team

name: Eric Trump
subject: re: 2017 Membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
President Trump requested that we reach out to you. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c38f81b2a288aa2146836fd011aa0c2ac66f2a72f8ef16498894304b1844e07e06be0e5fc5dde5d3fbc2c5eb7c49a226c8d4871a84affb08)
---

Friend,

You were one of the critical Americans who helped change the course of American history when my father was voted into office last November.

But now more than a year has gone by, and as the media's attacks become increasingly nasty, **the President needs to know - are you still on Team Trump?**

**Before 2017 comes to an end, my father is hoping to have your name in the books as a Sustaining Member of our movement to Make America Great Again!**

---

body:
In Wisconsin, almost 5,600 parolees, living in neighborhoods just like yours, were charged with further crimes while on probation, and were NOT sent b

Friend, if like me you worry about the safety of your community, you might be worried about this.

In Wisconsin, almost 5,600 parolees, living in neighborhoods just like yours, were charged with further crimes while on probation, and were NOT sent back to jail.

Avoiding this issue and keeping criminals — sometimes violent ones — in our communities is unacceptable. According to some, criminal violation of probation isn’t serious enough to revoke probation status.

I have to ask, friend: ARE THEY SERIOUS?
[KEEP OUR COMMUNITIES SAFE](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1f09d286f23c4776b0f3372a1ecd6aa6&_e=jwq6qq0ngcH0rKl7b56YduCquuAoDYOYssW7zgGbXv5YKqZZxttgc98I1EfpXLbXQCQp3rPq2f3P6E9RTdajul_OZu4tDMWvmyNsuGra7ceNXs0k7pgTG8RqoYFLb1583qJ3N3FE0GpE5158u9tLHccY0EjZqbLzlvy8piZobyvIo9K4bJHkTRJdDU3t2ho3lQM_N3phJTqOovm2s49JGGMIUpXPYf627QD9cXaJNcwMCrwfSXHy9f10GKpX7qmYTMxednldb1kjN3_GoDBPsIurX6BwP7zOPIj9DXLqO51HZrGY4I9k3EBnlQWKQ_5M8JqYckuI2qX2ImgJ3BSLsfa38zB-iMdcyETfJiS_ZCaxcbNGAPXhZUyYT3qwktJb53zQpDDnMaJysMGKy_su_UVUzarfPFLF-EJ0Pom1PUY4MVLBXrgxv9936aM1OW6Y)

These backwards laws and loopholes that protect criminals are putting our families at risk. We deserve better.

If you ask me, the solution is simple. If you violate the law while on probation, you should go back to jail.

It’s as simple as that!

I put together a petition to protect our communities, and [**I hope you’ll sign it with me to bring attention to this serious issue.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1f09d286f23c4776b0f3372a1ecd6aa6&_e=jwq6qq0ngcH0rKl7b56YduCquuAoDYOYssW7zgGbXv5YKqZZxttgc98I1EfpXLbXQCQp3rPq2f3P6E9RTdajul_OZu4tDMWvmyNsuGra7ceNXs0k7pgTG8RqoYFLb1583qJ3N3FE0GpE5158u9tLHccY0EjZqbLzlvy8piZobyvIo9K4bJHkTRJdDU3t2ho3lQM_N3phJTqOovm2s49JGP8s1Qf3JImeXHf2s0DJ_o3xPWssACCSR7D9IwhbAnba1LWbxlWqW9jkN4CqVC_dyMbXNPPyDIPWe96Iapv2pDqXaFtYjHDFe6I17frP3P5IfWXHOkj9TeRDLbrMJKg6NQDZ_zOeVxjJFzK2DFxk4rXHGnL1YVByaKD9hoGC63F5AIYz-E_2t8NTN2JIwjMlu1p7oauOQjteA2g6-YQ78qGDxNT7dHN2vBOQc_HwrJHb)

clean_body: In Wisconsin, almost 5,600 parolees, living in neighborhoods just like yours, were charged with further crimes while on probation, and were NOT sent b Friend, if like me you worry about the safety of your community, you might be worried about this. In Wisconsin, almost 5,600 parolees, living in neighborhoods just like yours, were charged with further crimes while on probation, and were NOT sent back to jail. Avoiding this issue and keeping criminals — sometimes violent ones — in our communities is unacceptable. According to some, criminal violation of probation isn’t serious enough to revoke probation status. I have to ask, friend: ARE THEY SERIOUS? These backwards laws and loopholes that protect criminals are putting our families at risk. We deserve better. If you ask me, the solution is simple. If you violate the law while on probation, you should go back to jail. It’s as simple as that! I put together a petition to protect our communities, and Friend, we are a nation of laws and I want our laws to be as clear as possible. If you commit a crime while on probation, your probation should be revoked! Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

body:
I first founded the Women's Senate Network in 2001 with the idea of creating a support system for my female Democratic colleagues and I. Today, the Women's Senate Network continues to build on that initial work and is expanding its outreach efforts.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171205-Stabenow-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team --

I founded the Women's Senate Network in 2001 to create a support system for all of us as Democratic women Senators.

We were only nine Democratic Senators then, and it was clear to me that we needed to do something to get more of us elected and to be there for one another.

We are an important resource for each other -- sharing advice on issues we care passionately about or just being there for each other when it's been a tough week.

Today, the Women's Senate Network is expanding to not only help the ten female Democratic Senators up for re-election next year (including me!) but to get more women elected.

[**To keep this going, we need all hands on deck. That 's why I'm writing to you, team. Can you chip in today to support the efforts of the Women's Senate Network?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171205-Stabenow-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Nearly half the women of the Senate are up for re-election in 2018 -- and with your support, team, you can help send every single one of us back to the Senate.

We also have a huge opportunity to add two more Democratic women to the Senate: Jacky Rosen in Nevada and Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona.

Team, women are changemakers because we have a practical approach to getting things done. We need more of that in Washington.

**Will you chip in today to support the Women 's Senate Network and give our female Democratic candidates the resources they need to launch strong, tough campaigns?**

body:
Congress has been bought and paid for by corporations and the 0.1 percent
#
Friends,
The plain fact of the matter is that Congress has been bought and paid for by corporations and the 0.1 percent. The GOP tax plan passed this weekend is a massive payoff to the corporations and special interests that finance campaigns and elections. This plan is another example of systemic corruption and pay-to-play politics that Our Revolution is fighting against. That's why we support Our Revolution and that's why we're teaming up to hack at the root of injustice by stamping big money out of politics.
Ben started the **Stamp Stampede** to harness that power of people over dollars. There's now over 80,000 of us that are **_legally_** rubber-stamping paper currency with messages like "Stamp Money Out of Politics" and "Not to be Used to Bribe Politicians." We're turning money into media--using money to get money out of politics.
[**Join us! When you donate $25 or more to Our Revolution by Midnight EST, you'll receive a FREE Stamp Money Out Of Politics self-inking rubber stamp.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae23/bed43eb/26292ee4/75ff70fa/3415903987/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stampout?refcode=em171205")

Money is the original viral marketing medium. A stamped dollar gets seen 875 times as it gets passed from person to person. By tagging dollars with our message we demonstrate overwhelming public demand to pass legislation and amend the Constitution. And it has staying power. The average bill that gets stamped stays in circulation for 2 1/2 years. The numbers are astounding. Just one person stamping 3 bills a day for a year creates **a million impressions**.
They may have gobs of money on their side, but we have the people.
[**Support Our Revolution, join the fight to end big money politics, and help create a better democracy. That's what we call a win-win.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae23/bed43eb/26292ee4/75ff70fa/3415903987/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stampout?refcode=em171205")

body:
#
Hello,

We've got a new addition to the team!

Here at Team Gillum, we're excited to welcome Brendan McPhillips as my new campaign manager in our fight to rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us.

**[So, we're putting something together, and we need your help. Will you add your name to the welcome card that we're surprising him with?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3223/9e00690/417a6876/240339b9/1772973049/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/welcome-brendan?utm_campaign=em17_171204_Welc1_acq_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em17_171204_Welc1_acq_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMESo+were+putting+something+toget")**

Brendan's an unapologetic progressive who has fought for what we believe in all across the country. He previously served as the political director for Hillary for America in Pennsylvania and worked as the campaign manager for John Fetterman's 2016 U.S. Senate race in Pennsylvania -- a national progressive leader.

Having a campaign manager is a lot like a new family member. So I'm excited to give a warm welcome to Brendan as he joins this team.

I know Brendan will bring new ideas to this race and help this campaign ensure that the values we all hold dear are part of every conversation between now and Election Day.

Andrew

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Mark my words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
This is class warfare, led by the Koch brothers and other wealthy Republican campaign contributors.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I believe that historians will look back at the early morning hours of Dec. 2, 2017, and conclude that it was one of the great acts of thievery in the history of the United States.
Let me be very clear about what is happening here. It is an extraordinarily cynical "two-step" process. First, Republicans are looting the Treasury. They are stealing trillions of dollars from the American people in order to give huge tax breaks to billionaires and large corporations. Second, as their tax breaks increase the deficit by $1.4 trillion, they will come back and, in the name of "deficit reduction," propose major cuts to Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, education, nutrition, affordable housing and other programs desperately needed by the shrinking middle class.
**This is class warfare, led by the Koch brothers and other wealthy Republican campaign contributors. More for the rich. Less for working families. Our job now is to stand up and fight back.**
That is why last weekend I spoke to large crowds in Louisville, Kentucky, Dayton and Akron, Ohio, and Reading, Pennsylvania. Over 5,000 people took time out of their weekend to attend these high energy meetings in person and almost one million watched on-line. At these rallies activists heard not only from me, but from working people, DREAMers, nurses, Planned Parenthood patients and others about how this tax bill would negatively impact them, their kids, their parents and the future of our country.
Everyone made it absolutely clear that we need to keep fighting against this disastrous piece of legislation and not stop until we defeat it.
This legislation now goes to something called a "conference committee" where the House and Senate work out the differences between their respective bills. Then, the bill comes back for final passage. That means we probably have about three or four weeks to educate and organize the American people to defeat this dangerous bill. Please, get on the phone to your House and Senate members. Email them. Spread the word to your friends by social media. Talk to your co-workers. In the midst of massive income and wealth inequality, this country does not need more tax breaks for billionaires.
I will not stop until we defeat this disastrous piece of legislation. But I cannot do it alone:
**[Please sign my petition calling on the United States Congress to vote NO on the Republican tax reform legislation that gives obscene amounts of money to people and corporations who have so much, while laying the groundwork for massive cuts to programs that working families, the elderly, the children, the sick and the poor depend upon.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/this-is-class-warfare?source=em171205-ph-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/this-is-class-warfare?source=em171205-ph-full")**

_(A packed house in Akron, Ohio on Saturday Night.)_
One point I made clear at each stop on this trip is that Donald Trump, Paul Ryan and Mitch McConnell have a plan.
Mark my words. Once they pass this bill, they will claim we need to deal with the deficit by cutting Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid. You don't have to take my word for it. Here is what the New York Times wrote this weekend:
"As the tax cut legislation passed by the Senate early Saturday hurtles toward final approval, Republicans are preparing to use the swelling deficits made worse by the package as a rationale to pursue their long-held vision: undoing the entitlements of the New Deal and Great Society, leaving government leaner and the safety net skimpier for millions of Americans."
You might recall that during the campaign Donald Trump told the American people time and time again that he would not cut Social Security, Medicare or Medicaid. Well, like so much else, it is clear he was lying.
Remember, this legislation has nothing to do with what the American people want. Poll after poll shows that ordinary Americans are strongly opposed to this giveaway to the rich. On the other hand, this "tax reform" has everything to do with what wealthy campaign contributors want. It has everything to do with a corrupt campaign finance system. This bill is nothing more payback time for those who finance the Republican Party.
**[Please sign my petition calling on the United States Congress to vote NO on the Republican tax reform legislation that gives obscene amounts of money to people and corporations who have so much, while cutting services and programs for working families.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/this-is-class-warfare?source=em171205-ph-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/this-is-class-warfare?source=em171205-ph-full")**

_(Capacity crowd in Reading, Pennsylvania on Sunday)_
Make no mistake about it. The political momentum is with us. A few weeks ago, on Election Day, Nov. 7, 2017, Donald Trump's name may not have been on the ballot, but Trumpism was. And it suffered a massive defeat. From coast to coast, in small towns and large cities, working people and young people, many of them first time candidates, ran for office - and won. Voter turnouts in many parts of the country were surprisingly high.
People are fighting back to reclaim their democracy. They are fighting for a government and economy that works for all of us, not just the 1 percent. And now we have got to continue that pressure. Our job in the next few weeks is to make our voices heard louder than ever. Yes. If we do that, we can stop this morally bankrupt bill.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

There's not much time left before Ben & Jerry's offer to receive a FREE "Stamp Money Out of Politics" stamp runs out!
#
Hi there,
There's not much time left before Ben & Jerry's offer to receive a **FREE** "Stamp Money Out of Politics" stamp runs out!
**Contribute $25 or more to Our Revolution before Midnight EST and we'll send you a free "Stamp Money Out of Politics" self-inking rubber stamp.**
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae20/bed43eb/2699d332/75ff73f0/493908497/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stampout?refcode=em171205-kick")**
Just one stamped dollar bill gets seen an average of 875 times, and one person stamping three bills a day in one year creates over **one million impressions**. Join us as we take part in this viral marketing campaign to get big money out of politics today.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
\----------Forwarded message----------
From: **Ben & Jerry**
Date: Tue, Dec 5, 2017 at 1:02 PM
Subject: The GOP tax plan payoff
Friends,
The plain fact of the matter is that Congress has been bought and paid for by corporations and the 0.1 percent. The GOP tax plan passed this weekend is a massive payoff to the corporations and special interests that finance campaigns and elections. This plan is another example of systemic corruption and pay-to-play politics that Our Revolution is fighting against. That's why we support Our Revolution and that's why we're teaming up to hack at the root of injustice by stamping big money out of politics.
Ben started the **Stamp Stampede** to harness that power of people over dollars. There's now over 80,000 of us that are **_legally_** rubber-stamping paper currency with messages like "Stamp Money Out of Politics" and "Not to be Used to Bribe Politicians." We're turning money into media--using money to get money out of politics.
[**Join us! When you donate $25 or more to Our Revolution by Midnight EST, you'll receive a FREE Stamp Money Out Of Politics self-inking rubber stamp.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae20/bed43eb/2699d332/75ff73f0/493908497/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stampout?refcode=em171205-kick")

Money is the original viral marketing medium. A stamped dollar gets seen 875 times as it gets passed from person to person. By tagging dollars with our message we demonstrate overwhelming public demand to pass legislation and amend the Constitution. And it has staying power. The average bill that gets stamped stays in circulation for 2 1/2 years. The numbers are astounding. Just one person stamping 3 bills a day for a year creates **a million impressions**.
They may have gobs of money on their side, but we have the people.
[**Support Our Revolution, join the fight to end big money politics, and help create a better democracy. That's what we call a win-win.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ae20/bed43eb/2699d332/75ff73f0/493908497/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stampout?refcode=em171205-kick")
In solidarity,
Ben Cohen and Jerry Greenfield
Co-founders of Ben & Jerry's Ice Cream
